zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Breteuil於大約1079年出生在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓時，她的父親William de Breteuil II29歲，母親Adeliza de Montfort22歲。她於1097年與Ascelin d'Ivry結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1121年在法國豪-諾門迪艾易福-拉-巴塔爾享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Breteuil于大约1079年出生在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓时，她的父亲William de Breteuil II29岁，母亲Adeliza de Montfort22岁。她于1097年与Ascelin d'Ivry结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1121年在法国豪-諾門迪艾易福-拉-巴塔爾享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Breteuil was born about 1079, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France, her father, William de Breteuil II, was 29 and her mother, Adeliza de Montfort, was 22. She married Ascelin d'Ivry in 1097. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1121, in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 43.

fr.Engand: Yŏnam-nodongjagu, BAEK-AM-GUN, Ryanggang, Corée du Nord
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Breteuil est née environ 1079, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, William de Breteuil II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Adeliza de Montfort, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Ascelin d'Ivry en 1097. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1121, à Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.Castle Cary, Somerset, England: Castle Cary, Somerset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Breteuil um 1079 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Breteuil II 29 und ihre Mutter Adeliza de Montfort 22. Sie hat 1097 Ascelin d'Ivry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1121 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Breteuil è nata il circa 1079 nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, William de Breteuil II, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Adeliza de Montfort, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Ascelin d'Ivry nel 1097. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1121, nel Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Breteuilが約1079年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンで生まれた時，父William de Breteuil IIは29歳，母Adeliza de Montfortは22歳であった。1097年にAscelin d'Ivryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1121年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアイvリ-ラ-バティイルで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Breteuil(이)가 대략 1079년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Breteuil II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adeliza de Montfort(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1097년 Ascelin d'Ivry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1121년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 이브리-라-바테이에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Breteuil nasceu aproximadamente 1079, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, William de Breteuil II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Adeliza de Montfort, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Ascelin d'Ivry em 1097. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1121, em Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 43 anos.

ro.Castle Cary, Somerset, England: Castle Cary, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Breteuil родилась около 1079 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени William de Breteuil II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Adeliza de Montfort, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ascelin d'Ivry в 1097 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1121 г. в местности иври-ла-батеилл, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 43 лет.

Se casó con Ascelin d'Ivry en 1097. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1121, en Ivry-la-Bataille, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 43 años.
